iran_nuke.notes: Day 21 auto — ELEVATED 27% (stable). NCTC Kent resignation confirms 'no imminent threat' — significant internal dissent but Gabbard backs Trump. Senate Intel testimony Wed. No enrichment escalation. Bushehr stable. Nuclear track unchanged.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 21 auto — IMMINENT 100% (stable). IRGC fires cluster warheads (Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr) at Tel Aviv — revenge for Larijani. 2 killed Ramat Gan. Army chief Hatami vows 'decisive and regrettable' further retaliation. Oil $102. Hormuz still paralyzed. No ceasefire signals. War expanding.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 21 auto — IMMINENT 100% (stable). Beirut strikes kill 6. Ground ops expanding south of Zahrani. 1M+ displaced. Hezbollah ~100 rockets/day. Merz calls ground offensive 'error.' Stable at ceiling.

turkey.notes: Day 21 auto — ELEVATED 27% (stable). No new incidents. 3 Iranian missiles previously intercepted over Turkey still the main signal. Incirlik defense bolstered. Stable.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 14% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 (03:00 UTC) — ELEVATED. India evacuating nationals from ME. Hormuz deal with Iran. No new India-Pakistan signals. Stable.

russia.notes: Day 21 auto — ELEVATED 24% (stable). Arms supply to Iran ongoing. Intelligence sharing expanded. No direct intervention. Ukraine front grinding. Stable.

china.notes: Day 21 auto — DETERRENT 9% (stable). Trump delays China visit due to war. Flights near Taiwan resumed/normal. Status quo.

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 (03:00 UTC) — DETERRENT. No verified signals. Indian clickbait sources only (poojanews.com). Not Reuters/BBC/AP confirmed. Extended quiet continues.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 21 auto — CRITICAL 42% (stable). Russia takes 12 settlements in early March (Gerasimov). Ukraine liberated 400km2 in Zaporizhzhia. Peace talks frozen due to Iran war. Turkey offers to host next round. Stable.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 21 auto — CRITICAL 59% (up). Kabul drug rehab centre strike kills 100+ (BBC confirmed). Separate from earlier 400-dead hospital strike. Taliban calls it 'crime against humanity.' EU urges restraint. Escalating. Ceasefire by March 31 on prediction markets.

top_signals: IRAN fires cluster warhead missiles (Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr) at Tel Aviv — revenge for Larijani assassination
2 killed in Ramat Gan from cluster munition strike — first use of cluster warheads against Israeli cities
Iran army chief vows 'decisive and regrettable' retaliation — escalation cycle continues
NCTC Director Kent resigns: 'Iran posed no imminent threat' — cites Israeli misinformation to Trump
Kabul drug rehab centre struck — 100+ killed (BBC confirmed), separate from 400-death hospital strike
Israel strikes Beirut kill 6 — Lebanon ground invasion deepening, 1M+ displaced
Oil Brent ~$102/barrel (+3%), up 40% since war began — IEA to release emergency reserves
Trump delays China visit 'because we've got a war' — US-China diplomacy frozen
Gabbard backs Trump despite Kent resignation — Senate Intelligence testimony Wednesday
EU/Germany refuse Hormuz coalition — Trump reverses: 'US never needed NATO'

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 21): ZERO de-escalation signals across all theaters. Iran escalates to cluster warheads against Tel Aviv. Israel expands Lebanon ground ops + Beirut strikes. Pakistan kills 100+ in Kabul. War expanding, not contracting. No ceasefire in ANY theater.

latest_news.headline: Iran fires cluster warhead missiles at Tel Aviv — 2 killed in Ramat Gan, revenge for Larijani
latest_news.source: Reuters / BBC / NYT / Times of Israel
latest_news.text: IRGC launches Khorramshahr-4 and Qadr missiles with cluster warheads at Tel Aviv area. AP footage shows cluster munition release over Israel. 2 killed in Ramat Gan. Iran state TV: 'revenge for martyrdom of Ali Larijani.' Army chief Hatami vows 'decisive and regrettable' further retaliation.

latest_news.headline: Kabul drug rehab centre airstrike — 100+ killed (BBC confirmed)
latest_news.text: BBC confirms 100+ killed in Pakistani airstrike on drug treatment centre in Kabul. Separate from earlier hospital strike (400 dead). Taliban calls it 'crime against humanity.' EU urges restraint. Pakistan denies targeting civilians.

latest_news.headline: NCTC Director Kent resigns: 'Iran posed no imminent threat' — cites Israeli misinformation
latest_news.source: Politico / CNBC / BBC / NBC / Washington Post
latest_news.text: Joe Kent (NCTC Director, retired Green Beret, Trump loyalist) resigns citing Israeli 'misinformation' and lies to Trump about 'swift path to victory.' Says Iran posed no imminent threat. Gabbard backs Trump anyway. Senate Intel Committee testimony Wednesday.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes kill 6 in Beirut — Lebanon ground invasion expanding
latest_news.text: Israeli strikes kill at least 6 in Beirut as ground operations in southern Lebanon continue. 1M+ displaced. Germany's Merz calls ground offensive an 'error.' Hezbollah attacks Israeli troops in 3 border towns.

latest_news.headline: Oil Brent $102 (+3%), up 40% since war — IEA to release emergency reserves
latest_news.text: Brent crude settles at $102.36/barrel, up 3% on renewed Iran-UAE attacks. Prices up 40% since war began Feb 28. IEA announces emergency oil reserves will flow to markets. US diesel hits $5/gallon, highest since 2022. Gas prices at highest since Oct 2023.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 21, 05:00 UTC) — War Day 19. Iran escalates with cluster warhead missiles on Tel Aviv (2 killed, Ramat Gan) in retaliation for Larijani assassination. Army chief vows 'decisive and regrettable' further strikes. NCTC Director Kent resigns citing Israeli misinformation; Gabbard backs Trump regardless. Kabul drug rehab airstrike kills 100+ (BBC confirmed). Israel kills 6 in Beirut. Oil Brent $102 (+3%, +40% since war). IEA releasing emergency reserves. No ceasefire signals in any theater. Senate Intel testimony Wednesday — potential inflection point.

predictions.description: Strait of Hormuz expected to remain under Iranian blockade. Additional shipping attacks probable within 12 hours.
Israeli ground operation in southern Lebanon expected to continue beyond Litani River. Further displacement and infrastructure destruction likely.
Status quo maintained. No PLA activity changes detected. Taiwan Strait remains stable.
PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN remains stable at current levels. No significant changes anticipated.
RUSSIA-UKRAINE remains stable at current levels. No significant changes anticipated.
No immediate nuclear threshold events anticipated. Status quo enrichment posture likely maintained.
TURKEY-NATO remains stable at current levels. No significant changes anticipated.
RUSSIA-NATO remains stable at current levels. No significant changes anticipated.
INDIA-PAKISTAN remains stable at current levels. No significant changes anticipated.
